810000.name: Lust Pointer
descriptionLines: A rifle used em mercenaries who guarded the Barmund Mansion.
It was terribly transformed em the magic interference device installed em the Illusionians.
Aumenta o dano de ^009900Hammer of God^000000 em 10%.
Aumenta a velocidade de ataque (Reduz o atraso após ataque em 10%).
Aumenta o dano de ^009900Hammer of God^000000 em additional 15%.
Diminui ^009900Hammer of God^000000 skill cooldown em 3 segundos.
Diminui ^009900Hammer of God^000000 skill cooldown em additional 4 segundos.
When ^009900Crimson Marker^000000 has been used, Aumenta o dano de ^009900Hammer of God^000000 em additional 25% for 10 segundos.

810001.name: Patent Master Soul Rifle
descriptionLines: A rifle with the power of the soul used by those who have reached the Level of Gunmaster who can handle all guns skillfully.
A powerful force was inhabited and began to show its natural strength.
It seems to resonate with the Great Hero's Boots.
Aumenta o dano of ^009900Espíritos Anciões^000000 and ^009900Vulcão Napalm^000000 by 15%.
Aumenta o dano of ^009900Impacto Espiritual^000000 by 20% and ^FF0000Fogo^000000 elemental magic o dano by 15%.
Ranged ataque físicos have a 15% chance to auto-cast Level 10 ^009900Espíritos Anciões^000000.
Ranged ataque físicos have a 7% chance to auto-cast Level 3 ^009900Vulcão Napalm^000000 or Level 3 ^009900Impacto Espiritual^000000.
Aumenta ^FF0000Fogo^000000 elemental magic o dano by 5%.

810002.name: Adulter Fides Rifle
descriptionLines: A rifle filled with false beliefs.
Increases o dano of ^009900Hammer of God^000000 by 10%.
Increases o dano of ^009900Hammer of God^000000 by additional 20%.
Decreases ^009900Hammer of God^000000 skill cooldown by 8 seconds.
Increases o dano of ^009900Hammer of God^000000 by additional 25%.
Increases ranged physical o dano by 15%.
